description_long: This is a large, open-topped blue plastic bucket or barrel with a wide, octagonal rim and a slightly tapered body. The exterior surface is smooth and uniformly colored, with a subtle gradient suggesting molded plastic. Two integrated grip handles are present on opposite sides, each recessed into the upper rim for easy lifting and carrying. The interior is hollow and spacious, suitable for holding liquids, debris, or other materials. There are no visible lids, markings, or reinforcements, giving it a clean and utilitarian appearance ideal for urban or outdoor use.
description: A large blue plastic bucket with integrated side grips and a wide, open top. The surface is smooth and unmarked, with a sturdy, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the integrated grip handle recessed into the rim.
description_view_1: Side view with no visible handle, displaying the smooth, continuous surface.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the second integrated grip handle visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing a smooth surface without a handle.
